lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Dil ki dhadkan tez ho gayi
Teri aankhon mein kho gayi
Har pal tera intezaar hai
Tu hi mera pyaar hai

[Chorus]
Nachle nachle saari raat
Chhod de saari baat
Bas tu aur main
Duniya bhool jaye hum dono
Nachle nachle saari raat

[Verse 2]
DJ bajaye gaana mera
Naache saara shehar tera
Bijli si chamke tu jab muskuraye
Sab kuch ruk jaaye

[Chorus]
Nachle nachle saari raat
Chhod de saari baat
Bas tu aur main
Duniya bhool jaye hum dono
Nachle nachle saari raat

[Outro]
Nachle nachle
Bas nachle nachle
